title: 16S Library pooling
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol uses a .csv file to pool a calculated volume of each sample from a PCR plate into one or more 1.5 mL snapcap tube(s). Explanation of complex parameters below: * `input .csv file`: Here, you should upload a .csv file formatted in the following way, being sure to include the header line: ``` Sample Location,Qubits,Volume (ul) for ng: 70,Sample Destination,,,,,,,,,,, A1,3.5,20.0,A1,,,,,,,,,,, A2,15,4.7,A2,,,,,,,,,,, ``` ---
steps_raw: This protocol uses a .csv file to pool a calculated volume of each sample from a PCR plate into one or more 1.5 mL snapcap tube(s). Explanation of complex parameters below: * `input .csv file`: Here, you should upload a .csv file formatted in the following way, being sure to include the header line: ``` Sample Location,Qubits,Volume (ul) for ng: 70,Sample Destination,,,,,,,,,,, A1,3.5,20.0,A1,,,,,,,,,,, A2,15,4.7,A2,,,,,,,,,,, ``` ---
Transfer 2-35 uL from the 96 well PCR plate to a 2 mL snap tube
Repeat across the entire plate according to the .csv file
materials_raw: Opentrons Tough 0.2 mL 96-Well PCR Plate, Full Skirt
Fisherbrand 2.0 mL Microcentrifuge Tubes with Locking Snap Cap
